attributes.description: Alerts when process RSS exceeds 2 GB. Traefik is usually memory-light; elevated RSS indicates workload growth or a leak.
attributes.name: [Traefik OTel] High memory usage

investigation_guide.blob:
## Traefik high memory usage

### What fired
`process_resident_memory_bytes > 2 GB` during the window.

### Why it matters
Typical Traefik footprint is 100–500 MB. Multi-GB usage suggests a leak or very large config.

### Triage
1. Check config size and active connection count.

### Remediation
- Restart / scale Traefik.

### Tuning
- 2 GB threshold; tune per workload.
